name: Chevron
notes:
Operational Issues: globalnetops1@chevron.com 24x7 
Peering Requests: peering@chevron.com
Chevron also manages AS62926

----------
Chevron looks to establish peering connections with networks we have an existing business relationship or exchange significant amounts of traffic with. You must have a peeringdb entry to be added to our systems as a peer.
Chevron peers per region (US/EU/AP) so build as many sessions as possible please and we do not peer with route servers.
Please drop peering@chevron.com a note to add new locations.
